---
title : " Series de tiempo"
---

# Librerías
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data
```
# Carga de datos
```{python}
movies_cleaned = data.movies()
movies_cleaned.head()
```
# Información del dataset
```{python}
movies_cleaned.info()
```
# Cambiar release_date a formato datetime
```{python}
movies_cleaned['Release_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(movies_cleaned['Release_Date'], errors='coerce')
movies_cleaned.info()
``` 
# Gráfico de línea Release Date y el conteo de US_Gross
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_line(point=True).encode(
    x = alt.X("year(Release_Date)"),
    y = alt.Y("sum(US_Gross)"),
    tooltip = ["year(Release_Date)", "sum(US_Gross)"]
).interactive()
```
# Gráfico de línea con trail()
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_trail(point=True).encode(
    x = alt.X("year(Release_Date)"),
    y = alt.Y("sum(US_Gross)"),
    tooltip = ["year(Release_Date)", "sum(US_Gross)"]
).interactive()
```
# Gráfico de linea acumulativo
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_line().transform_window(
sort = [{"field": "Release_Date"}],
accumulative_use_gross= "sum(US_Gross)"
).encode(
    x = alt.X("Release_Date"),
    y = alt.Y("accumulative_use_gross:Q"),

).interactive()
```

# Gráfico de área
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
        color=  "lightblue"    , 
        interpolate= "cardinal",
        line = True
).encode(
    x = alt.X("year(Release_Date)"),
    y = alt.Y("sum(US_Gross)"),

).interactive()
```

# Gráfico de área con gradiente de color
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    interpolate="basis",
    line=True,
    color=alt.Gradient(
        gradient="linear",
        stops=[
            alt.GradientStop(color="white", offset=0),
            alt.GradientStop(color="darkgreen", offset=1),
        ],
        x1=1,
        x2=1,
        y1=1,
        y2=0,
    ),
).encode(
    alt.X("year(Release_Date)"),
    alt.Y("sum(US_Gross)"),
    tooltip=["year(Release_Date)", "sum(US_Gross):Q"],
).properties(
    width=600, height=300
).interactive()
```

# Highlight 
## Multiples series
```{python}
highlight = alt.selection_point(
    on="pointerover", fields=["Major_Genre"], clear="pointerout"
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_line(point=True).encode(
    x=alt.X("year(Release_Date)"),
    y=alt.Y("sum(US_Gross)"),
    color=alt.Color("Major_Genre"),
    opacity=alt.condition(highlight, alt.value(1), alt.value(0.3)),
    tooltip=["year(Release_Date)", "sum(US_Gross)"],
).add_params(highlight).interactive()
```

## Multiples series con áreas
```{python}
highlight = alt.selection_point(
    on="pointerover", fields=["Major_Genre"], clear="pointerout"
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(line=True, interpolate="cardinal").encode(
    x=alt.X("year(Release_Date)"),
    y=alt.Y("sum(US_Gross)"),
    color=alt.Color("Major_Genre"),
    opacity=alt.condition(highlight, alt.value(1), alt.value(0.3)),
    tooltip=["year(Release_Date)", "sum(US_Gross)"],
).add_params(highlight).interactive()
```

## Multiples series con streamgraphs
```{python}
highlight = alt.selection_point(
    on="pointerover", fields=["Major_Genre"], clear="pointerout"
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(line=True, interpolate="cardinal").encode(
    x=alt.X("year(Release_Date)"),
    y=alt.Y("sum(US_Gross)", stack="center", axis=None),
    color=alt.Color("Major_Genre"),
    opacity=alt.condition(highlight, alt.value(1), alt.value(0.3)),
    tooltip=["year(Release_Date)", "sum(US_Gross)"],
).add_params(highlight).interactive()
```

## Small Graphs
```{python}
format_gross = '$.3s'

highlight = alt.selection_point(
    on="pointerover",
    fields=["Major_Genre"],
    clear="pointerout"
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    interpolate='basis',
    line=True
).encode(
    x=alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    y=alt.Y(
        'sum(US_Gross)',
        title='Sum US Gross',
        axis=alt.Axis(format=format_gross)
    ),
    row=alt.Row("Major_Genre:N"),
    color="Major_Genre:N",
    opacity=alt.condition(
        highlight,
        alt.value(1),
        alt.value(0.3)
    ),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip('year(Release_Date)'),
        alt.Tooltip('Major_Genre'),
        alt.Tooltip('sum(US_Gross)', format=format_gross)
    ]
).add_params(
    highlight
).properties(
    width=600,
    height=70
).interactive()
```
# Heatmap temporal
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_rect().encode(
    x = alt.X("date(Release_Date):O", title = "Día"),
    y = alt.Y("month(Release_Date):O", title= "Mes"), 
    color = "sum(US_Gross)",
    tooltip=["sum(US_Gross)"]
)
```
